title: Telegram Scraper Reliability Enhancement: Closing the 15% Recall Gap

context.background: Recent 10-iteration stabilization loop improved recall from 0% to 85%. A 15% gap remains due to 'Over-Confident Heuristics'.
context.problem_statement: The system misses ~15% of picks because the rule-based extractor (score > 8.5) short-circuits AI refinement for complex messages (The 'Confidence Trap').

objectives: Identify specific messages constituting the 15% recall gap.
Implement dynamic thresholding to eliminate 'Confidence Trap' failures.
Prevent regressions via Golden Set expansion.

functional_requirements.name: Granular Failure Audit
functional_requirements.description: Isolate and categorize the specific messages missing from the current 85% recall baseline.
tasks: Categorize failures (e.g., complex teasers, channel formats).

functional_requirements.name: Dynamic Confidence Thresholding
functional_requirements.description: Implement 'Context Check' logic to force AI fallback based on semantic heuristics.

functional_requirements.name: Golden Set Expansion
functional_requirements.description: Update the golden set with identified edge cases.
